scripts.build: tsc -p tsconfig.json && node -e "const fs=require('node:fs'); const candidates=['dist/preload/index.js','apps/desktop/dist/preload/index.js']; const source=candidates.find((file)=>fs.existsSync(file)); if(!source){throw new Error('preload output not found');} const target=source.replace(/\.js$/, '.mjs'); if (fs.existsSync(target)) fs.rmSync(target); fs.renameSync(source, target);"
scripts.package: npm run rebuild:native && electron-builder --config electron-builder.yml --publish never
